justification: The question pertains specifically to the future stock price movements and market close performance of 3M Company (MMM) on a public stock exchange.
question:
Will MMM's market close price on each resolution date listed below be higher than its market close price on 2025-03-16?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
